creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm sorry that this wasn't addressed in a more timely fashion.
I believe that I made similar changes to this years ago.
But in the mean time, PCMCIA 16-bit card support has been removed
from FreeBSD, so this bug is no longer relevant from that.

Getting these goofy cards to power down w/o an interrupt storm was a constant struggle. I fixed dozens of similar issues, and often disabling interrupts would work on one laptop, but not others...

Somehow, I also overlooked this bug report until now. Our bug triage team is much better now than in the late 2000s when this was filed.
